case_title: EMMA AYALA VS. KATIE FORSMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF EMMA AYALA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KATIE FORSMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARELIN FUNES IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MARELIN FUNES WAS FILED UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT MARELIN FUNES WAIVES SERVICE. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANTS' MICHAEL KUMEEN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR (PAYMENT OF 1/2 OF TOTAL JUDGMENT BY DEFENDANT - FORSMAN) BY DEFENDANT FORSMAN, KATIE

(SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS: THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED,AND THE COURT ORDERS: [X] PAYMENTS OF $500.00, ON THE 29TH OF EACH MONTH STARTING 04/29/2019, UNTIL 09/29/2019, AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $200.00.

ORDER (SC-105A), CORRECTING CLERICAL ERROR ON ORDER (SC-222 - ISSUED MARCH 29, 2019) EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENT BY MARELIN FUNES OF $500 ON 29TH OF EACH MONTH STARTING AUGUST 29, 2019 FINAL PAYMENT OCT. 29, 2019
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT FORSMAN, KATIE FUNES, MARELIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AYALA, EMMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORSMAN, KATIE FUNES, MARELIN $6,285.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,400.00, DEFENDANTS KATIE FORSMAN AND MARELIN FUNES JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF EMMA AYALA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $3,200.00 RE 35825 FOR TRANSACTION R2819318D003 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO EMMA AYALA, DOC#1909788617, WARRANT #38205867, DATED MAY-08-2019
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY AYALA, EMMA AS TO DEFENDANT FORSMAN, KATIE FUNES, MARELIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
